sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this puzzle game

special_mechanics.name: Freezing Breath
special_mechanics.description: Kickle uses special freezing breath ability to turn enemies into ice, creating walkways on water or defeating other enemies

special_mechanics.name: Ice Pillar Creation
special_mechanics.description: Ability to create a pillar of ice in front of Kickle to act as a block obstacle

tier_notes: Tier 3: Kickle Cubicle is a puzzle game with minimal documented movement physics. No specific velocity, acceleration, gravity, or sub-pixel data available. Sources focus on gameplay mechanics, story, and regional differences rather than low-level physics parameters. Movement mechanics are driven by puzzle design rather than platforming physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Kickle Cubicle article
